options.name: -direction
options.description: specify the pin direction of objects to be reported (in|out|all), default:all

options.name: -file
options.description: file to save report result, if not specified, a file <top_module_name>.tmcrpt will be saved

options.name: -insts
options.description: specify the macros to be reported

options.name: -level
options.description: specify the report level (1 to 10), default:5

options.name: -no_split
options.description: report one object in one line

options.name: -ports
options.description: specify the IO ports to be reported

options.name: -selected
options.description: report the selected macros or IO ports

options.name: -through_registers
options.description: include registers through by paths between selected objects in report

options.name: -to_ports
options.description: report connectivity from selected objects to IO ports
